center.name: 布朗庫河
center.summary: 布朗庫河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Wire-tailed manakin、Pale-tipped inezia、Klages's antwren等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: lineatus is found from eastern Bolívar state in Venezuela east through Guyana and Suriname into French Guiana and south into Amazonian Brazil north of the Amazon between the Branco and Negro rivers. The fasciated antshrike inhabits evergreen forest both primary and secondary in the lowlands and Andean foothills

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Klages's antwren is native to northern Amazonia, where it occurs solely along the rio Branco, the confluences of the rio Negro and Madeira and along the Amazon River east to the mouth of the rio Tapajós

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the pale-tipped inezia is found in the Llanos of northeastern Colombia through central and eastern Venezuela and the Guianas into the upper Branco River basin and extreme northern Amapá state of northern Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: There its range extends east north of the Amazon to the Branco and Negro rivers and south of the Amazon to the upper Juruá and middle Purus rivers. The wire-tailed manakin inhabits a variety of somewhat open landscapes; in all of them it favors areas along watercourses
